title: viola × jaborneggii
intro: Viola × jaborneggii, also known as the viola hybrid, is a rare and unique plant species resulting from the cross between Viola lactea and Viola corymbosa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola × jaborneggii include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
